cwes.name: Data Access Outside Expected Component
cwes.requirement: Data access MUST be confined to the owning component

cwes.name: Insufficient Encapsulation
cwes.requirement: Internal implementation details MUST be hidden behind public interfaces

cwes.name: Source File With Excessive Lines of Code
cwes.requirement: Source files MUST NOT exceed language-appropriate line limits

cwes.name: Modules with Circular Dependencies
cwes.requirement: Module dependency graphs MUST be acyclic

cwes.name: Insufficient Technical Documentation
cwes.requirement: Public APIs MUST have documentation describing purpose and usage

cwes.name: Use of Redundant Code
cwes.requirement: Duplicated logic MUST be extracted into shared functions

cwes.name: Dead Code
cwes.requirement: Unreachable code MUST be removed from the codebase

cwes.name: Invokable Control Element with Signature Containing an Excessive Number of Parameters
Unconditional Control Flow Transfer out of Multiple Nested Blocks
cwes.requirement: Control flow MUST NOT use unconditional jumps out of deeply nested blocks

cwes.name: Loop Condition Value Update within Loop Body
cwes.requirement: Loop counter variables MUST NOT be modified inside the loop body

cwes.name: Method Invokable from Another Method of Different Trust Level
cwes.requirement: Trust boundaries MUST be enforced between components of different privilege levels

cwes.name: Parent Class with a Virtual Destructor and a Child Class without a Virtual Destructor
cwes.requirement: Inheritance hierarchies MUST maintain consistent destructor/cleanup patterns

cwes.name: Invokable Control Element with Large Number of Outward Calls
cwes.requirement: Functions MUST limit outward calls to ≤7 distinct callees to reduce coupling

cwes.name: Class with Excessively Deep Inheritance
cwes.requirement: Inheritance depth MUST NOT exceed 4 levels

cwes.name: Invokable Control Element with Excessive Volume of Commented-out Code
cwes.requirement: Commented-out code MUST be removed; use version control for history

cwes.name: Invocation of a Control Element at an Unnecessarily Deep Horizontal Layer
cwes.requirement: Components MUST call peers or immediate dependencies, not skip layers
